Popover content & behavior.question: How should popovers dismiss?
Popover content & behavior.answer: Click-outside + Esc (standard popover: click cluster to open, click anywhere else or Esc to close, one popover at a time)

Popover content & behavior.question: What shows in the LEFT popover?
Popover content & behavior.answer: Recent projects list (click project name → recents, click one = switch project, branch read-only detail, no branch switcher in L1)

Popover content & behavior.question: What shows in the CENTER popover?
Popover content & behavior.answer: Pane detail card (focused pane full path/cwd, shell name+version, PID, pane index, running command if any — read-only info)

Popover content & behavior.question: Component structure?
Popover content & behavior.answer: One generic Popover component (single <Popover anchor={el} content={...}> reused by all clusters, consistent positioning/dismiss/animation)

Notification store vs toasts.question: How do toasts and the notification bell relate?
Notification store vs toasts.answer: Unified stream — every event goes to BOTH toast (ephemeral, auto-dismiss) AND notification store (persistent, bell badge). Toast = real-time surface; bell = history.

Notification store vs toasts.question: What clears the bell badge?
Notification store vs toasts.answer: Opening the bell popover (click bell → popover opens → badge resets to 0, all shown marked as read)

Notification store vs toasts.question: Where does the notification store persist?
Notification store vs toasts.answer: Global notifications.json (~/.config/voss-app/notifications.json, single file, last 50 entries, written on quit, app-level not per-workspace)

Notification store vs toasts.question: L1 notification sources?
Notification store vs toasts.answer: Ship L1.8.2 as-is (pane exit non-zero, layout saved/loaded, settings reload, update available, app errors). L2 adds agent/cell events.
